200# return «
choose a throne:

Event: The Illusory Adventure
Event Date: 03/10/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: E56
Centerpiece of the Show Engraving

Enhancement: 1
Once in a while, the unit fires thorns at a random enemy unit. When the thorns hit, they tear the target's armor, and have a 65% chance to stun the victim for 2 sec. When the target is hit, it receives 56400 / 80600 / 115200 / 153600 / 192000 / 240000 / 300000 pure damage, and its armor is reduced by 10% / 11% / 12% / 13% / 15% / 17% / 20% for 3 sec. This enemy unit also receives 37600 / 53800 / 76000 / 102400 / 128000 / 160000 / 200000 physical damage over 3 sec.

Enhancement: 2
3000 Damage from the gems
Once in a while, the unit fires thorns at 2 random enemy units. When the thorns hit, they tear the targets' armor, and have a 65% chance to stun the victims for 3 sec. When the targets are hit, they receive 64700 / 92400 / 132000 / 176000 / 220000 / 275000 / 350000 pure damage, and their armor is reduced by 15% / 16% / 17% / 18% / 20% / 22% / 25% for 4 sec. These enemy units also receive 44700 / 63800 / 91200 / 121600 / 152000 / 190000 / 250000 physical damage over 3 sec. Thorns afflict their targets with exhaustion as well. Every second, the target receives physical damage equal to 125% / 130% / 135% / 140% / 150% / 160% / 175% of the attack of the engraving's owner. While an enemy unit is afflicted with exhaustion, the damage they deal and their attack speed are reduced by 10% / 11% / 12% / 13% / 15% / 17% / 20%. The exhaustion lasts for 3 sec.

Enhancement: 3
6000 Damage from the gems
Once in a while, the unit fires thorns at 3 random enemy units. When the thorns hit, they increase all damage received by the targets by 25% / 20% / 27% / 28% / 30% / 32% / 35% for 4, tear their armor, and have a 65% chance to stun the victims for 4 sec. When the targets are hit, they receive 74100 / 105800 / 151200 / 201600 / 252000 / 315000 / 400000 pure damage, and their armor is reduced by 20% / 21% / 72% / 23% / 25% / 27% / 30% for 4 sec. These enemy units also receive 56400 / 80600 / 115200 / 153600 / 192000 / 240000 / 300000 physical damage over 3 sec. Thorns afflict their targets, and all enemy units in a small radius around them, with exhaustion as well. Every second, targets under exhaustion receive physical damage equal to 150% / 155% / 100% / 165% / 175% / 185% / 200% of the attack of the engraving's owner. While an enemy unit is afflicted with exhaustion, the damage they deal and their attack speed are reduced by 15% / 16% / 17% / 18% / 20% / 22% / 25%. The exhaustion lasts for 4 sec.

Requirements:

Sage bot code: E56

First trigger: 3 sec

Cooldown: 10 secs
